task: Check the specifications of the best-selling HP FHD laptop with 16 GB RAM and core i7 running on Windows 11.
final_result_response:
Here are the full specifications of the best-selling HP FHD laptop with 16GB RAM, Core i7, and Windows 11 found on Best Buy (sorted by Best Selling):

---

## 🏆 HP - 15.6" Full HD Touch-Screen Laptop (Intel Core i7 1355U 2023)
**Model:** HP 15-fd0127dx | **Price:** $599.99 (Regular: $799.99) | **Badge:** Best Buy Value PC
**Product URL:** https://www.bestbuy.com/product/hp-15-6-full-hd-touch-screen-laptop-intel-core-i7-1355u-2023-16gb-memory-512gb-ssd-natural-silver/JJGRPJV92P

---

### 🖥️ Display
- Screen Size: 15.6 inches
- Screen Type: IPS / LED
- Resolution: 1920 x 1080 (Full HD)
- Touch Screen: Yes
- Brightness: 300 nits
- Color Gamut (NTSC): 45%

### ⚙️ Processor
- Brand: Intel
- Model: Intel 13th Generation Core i7
- Model Number: i7-1355U
- Boost Clock: 5 GHz
- Cores: 10-core
- L3 Cache: 12 MB

### 🧠 Memory & Storage
- RAM: 16 GB DDR4 @ 3200 MHz
- Storage: 512 GB PCIe SSD

### 🎮 Graphics
- GPU: Intel Iris Xe Graphics (Integrated)

### 💻 Software
- OS: Windows 11 Home
- Included: HP Support Assistant, myHP, HP BIOS Protection, and more

### 🔌 Connectivity
- USB: 1x USB-C 3.0, 2x USB-A 3.0
- HDMI: 1x HDMI 1.4
- Wireless: Wi-Fi 6, Bluetooth
- Ethernet: None
- Headphone Jack: Yes
- Microphone Input: Yes

### 🔋 Battery
- Battery Life: Up to 7.75 hours
- Chemistry: Lithium-ion polymer (3-cell)
- Power Supply: 45W

### 📷 Camera & Audio
- Front Camera: 720p with Privacy Shutter
- Built-In Microphone: Yes
- Speakers: Stereo with HD Audio

### 📐 Physical Details
- Color: Natural Silver
- Year: 2025
- Dimensions: 14.17" (W) × 9.29" (D) × 0.73" (H)
- Weight: 3.52 lbs
- Backlit Keyboard: No
- Numeric Keypad: Yes
- 2-in-1 Design: No
- Media Card Reader: No
- Optical Drive: None

### 🏅 Certifications & Warranty
- ENERGY STAR Certified: Yes
- EPEAT Level: Gold
- Warranty: 1 Year (Parts & Labor)
- UPC: 198828898210

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user asked the agent to check specifications of the best-selling HP FHD laptop with 16GB RAM, Core i7, and Windows 11 on Best Buy. A successful completion would involve: navigating to Best Buy, searching for the product, sorting by "Best Selling," identifying the top match, navigating to its product page, and extracting detailed specifications.

**Output Assessment:** The agent produced a comprehensive specification list for the HP 15.6" Full HD Touch-Screen Laptop (Intel Core i7-1355U, 16GB DDR4, 512GB SSD, Windows 11 Home) priced at $599.99. The response includes display specs, processor details, memory/storage, graphics, connectivity, battery, camera/audio, physical dimensions, and certifications — all organized clearly with headers and icons.

**Evidence:** Step files confirm: (1) The agent actually clicked the "Best Selling" sort option at step 10; (2) Step 16 shows the agent landed on the correct product page (HP 15.6" FHD Touch-Screen Laptop, i7-1355U, 16GB, $599.99); (3) Step 17 shows the agent clicked the Specifications button; (4) Step 26 shows the agent read the full specifications modal including display, processor, RAM, storage, battery, and connectivity data; (5) Step 22 shows Python extraction of spec key-value pairs. The final response specs (IPS screen, 300 nits, i7-1355U, 16GB DDR4, 512GB PCIe SSD, up to 7.75 hours battery, etc.) are directly corroborated by the step file content. Execution integrity status is "healthy" with zero errors.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated Best Buy, sorted results by "Best Selling," identified the top HP FHD laptop matching the criteria (16GB RAM, Core i7, Windows 11), navigated to its product page, clicked the Specifications tab, and extracted comprehensive specifications. Step files directly confirm each of these actions and the data extracted matches the final response.
